seo_title: Pisces February 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
h1: Pisces February 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
meta_description: Pisces February 2026 horoscope: Mercury retrograde in your sign, Saturn in Aries (your 2nd), the Aquarius solar eclipse in your 12th, and the Leo full moon in your 6th. Key dates, love, career, and Amethyst as crystal of the month.
energy_theme: Quiet threshold — rest before your season begins
key_dates_overview: Feb 1 — Full Moon in Leo (6th house)
Feb 17 — New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius (12th house)
Feb 26 — Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces (1st house, your sign)
affirmation: I rest at the threshold — my season is coming.
content:
This Month's Energy

Pisces, February 2026 is a quiet threshold month — the last weeks before your solar season begins in late March. The Aquarius solar eclipse on Feb 17 lands in your 12th house of rest, dreams, and the unconscious — the most introspective part of your chart. Saturn enters Aries on Feb 13-14 and opens a 2.5-year cycle in your 2nd house of money and self-worth. The Leo full moon on Feb 1 brings a work or health rhythm to a peak in your 6th house. Then Mercury turns retrograde in your own sign on Feb 26, slowing everything further. The theme: quiet threshold — rest before your season begins. What you complete in dream and silence now sets up your entire next year.

Key Dates

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Pisces | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|------------------|------------| | Feb 1 | Full Moon in Leo (Snow Moon) | A work or daily-rhythm arc peaks in your 6th house | Do: complete a health or work decision / Avoid: starting a new regimen | | Feb 13-14 | Saturn enters Aries | A 2.5-year cycle of money and self-worth begins in your 2nd house | Do: face one financial truth / Avoid: ignoring your value | | Feb 17 | New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius 28°04' | Eclipse in your 12th house rewrites rest, dreams, and closure | Do: name what you're completing / Avoid: forcing visibility this week | | Feb 17-20 | Saturn-Neptune conjunction at Aries 0° | Money meets dream — but Neptune is your modern ruler | Do: align income with intuition / Avoid: escaping through spending | | Feb 26 | Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces | Your ruling region slows — communication, body, identity | Do: revisit your self-concept / Avoid: signing contracts | | Feb 28 | Six-planet alignment | Stabilizes the inner work | Do: journal the dream of the year / Avoid: external pressure |

Career & Money

Saturn entering your 2nd house from Feb 13 begins a 2.5-year arc of getting serious about money, income, and self-worth — themes Pisces often spiritualizes rather than structures. Saturn's arrival says: the work is to make your value tangible. The Feb 17 12th-house eclipse, meanwhile, supports completing a hidden chapter — a project you've been quietly finishing, a pattern you've been working to release. The Leo full moon on Feb 1 already brought a daily-work rhythm to a peak. Mercury Rx in your sign from Feb 26 slows communication and identity review. Money: review rather than launch this month. For stones traditionally associated with prosperity and self-worth, see /crystals-for-wealth/. Pisces, Saturn entering your 2nd house from Feb 13 begins a 2.5-year arc of getting serious about money, income, and self-worth — themes Pisces often spiritualizes rather than structures. Saturn's arrival says: the work is to make your value tangible. The Feb 17 12th-house eclipse supports completing a hidden chapter — a project you've been quietly finishing, a pattern you've been working to release, a creative work that needs final revisions before it sees light. The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 6th already brought a daily-work rhythm to a peak. Mars in Cancer (your 5th house) all month supports creative momentum and romantic energy. Mercury Rx in your sign from Feb 26 slows communication and identity review. Money: review rather than launch this month; the bigger work is finishing and clearing.

Love & Relationships

The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your 6th house supports warm, everyday love — cozy routines, shared health practices, acts of service. Saturn in your 2nd from Feb 13 then begins a 2.5-year arc where self-worth shapes your love story: your value (or undervaluing) ripples into every relationship. The 12th-house eclipse on Feb 17 is private and introspective — closure of an old pattern, healing of a hidden wound, or a dream that clarifies a relationship truth. Mercury Rx in your sign from Feb 26 brings self-concept review. Single? Rest now; your season begins in March. For stones traditionally connected with love and emotional healing, see /crystals-for-love/ and /crystals-for-anxiety/. Pisces tends to merge; Saturn says: know your worth first, then merge consciously. For more on stones traditionally connected with emotional healing and self-worth, browse /crystals-for-anxiety/.

Health & Wellness

A 12th-house solar eclipse plus Mercury retrograde in your own sign makes February a deep rest month for Pisces — the universe is asking you to slow down before your birthday season. The lifestyle cue is structured gentleness: regular sleep, hydration, dream journaling, and time in water (baths, swims, even long showers). The Feb 1 Leo full moon supports a daily-rhythm completion. Saturn in your 2nd from Feb 13 also asks you to look at how stress and self-worth show up in your body. Amethyst is traditionally used as a calming symbol during introspective periods; it is not a medical intervention.

Crystal of the Month

Amethyst — the threshold keeper — is Pisces' crystal for February 2026. Why this crystal fits Pisces this month. As a water sign co-ruled by Neptune (modern) and Jupiter (traditional), you are the most porous, dream-sensitive sign of the zodiac. February 2026 stacks a 12th-house solar eclipse, a Mercury retrograde in your own sign, and a Saturn ingress in your money house — a lot of inner processing. Amethyst is traditionally associated with calm, spiritual clarity, and the gentle transmutation of dense emotion — your sign's most essential ally during a threshold month. How to use it during February. Place a piece under your pillow for the entire month (especially eclipse week, Feb 14-21). Hold it during dream journaling each morning. Carry it from Feb 26 when Mercury Rx in your sign slows communication. Best date to use it. February 17, the 12th-house eclipse — set it under your pillow with the question: what am I completing? Read more. Full Amethyst meaning guide and the Pisces crystals collection. Pisces benefits from working with Amethyst in water-adjacent ways — a piece beside your bath, on your nightstand, or near a glass of water you sip through the day matches your water-sign nature. As the sign co-ruled by Neptune (modern) and Jupiter (traditional), you are the most porous, dream-sensitive sign of the zodiac; Amethyst's traditional association with calm and clarity supports your boundary work. On Feb 17 (your 12th-house eclipse), place the stone under your pillow with the question: what am I completing? From Feb 26 (Mercury Rx in your sign), carry a small piece in your pocket — your ruling region slows, and the stone's traditional calming quality supports clear communication under pressure. Pair it with Moonstone or Aquamarine — your sign's traditional allies — for the full Pisces toolkit.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

The 12th-House Completion Ritual — February 17 (eclipse) 1. Cleanse. Place your Amethyst in a bowl of water with a pinch of sea salt on the morning of Feb 17. (Amethyst is water-safe for brief cleansing.) 2. Intention. Because the eclipse activates your 12th house of completion, write a list of what you're ready to release: old dreams that no longer fit, identities you've outgrown, patterns that once protected you but now limit you. 3. Action. Hold the Amethyst against your forehead (third-eye center) and read the list silently. Pisces processes through feeling, not just thought — let any emotion move. Then place the stone on the list and put both under your pillow for three nights. 4. Reflection. On Feb 28 (six-planet alignment), take out the list. Burn or shred it (safely). Keep the stone. The completion has done its work; your season begins in March.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Pisces crystal guide for stones connected with intuition, healing, dreams, and emotional balance — curated for your water-sign nature and the threshold year ahead.

FAQ

Is February 2026 a good month for Pisces? It's a quiet threshold month — the last weeks before your birthday season. A 12th-house eclipse and Mercury Rx in your sign ask for rest and review, not launch. Protect sleep. How will Saturn entering Aries affect Pisces? It enters your 2nd house of money, income, and self-worth for 2.5 years. Your value becomes tangible, structured, real. Face one financial truth this month. How will the February 17 solar eclipse affect Pisces? In your 12th house of rest, dreams, and the unconscious. A hidden chapter completes. Don't force visibility this week; let the inner work happen. What is the best crystal for Pisces in February 2026? Amethyst, for calm and clarity during a deep threshold month. Alternatives: Moonstone for dreamwork, Aquamarine for emotional flow. Full collection: Pisces crystals. Will Mercury retrograde in Pisces affect me strongly? Yes — Mercury Rx in your own sign from Feb 26 slows communication, body, and identity. Revisit your self-concept; don't sign contracts until late March.
